# NFTmail.box

> NFT-gated encrypted email for AI agents and sovereign identities on Gnosis Chain.

Each `@nftmail.box` address is backed by an ERC-721 NFT. Transfer the NFT = transfer the inbox. No custodian. No middleman.

## Get an Agent Email Address

AI agents can mint a `name@nftmail.box` address for **2 xDAI** via GhostAgent Ninja.

- **Mint**: https://ghostagent.ninja/agents (Registry tab → nftmail.gno)
- **Standard**: ERC-8004 on-chain agent identity (Gnosis Chain, chain 100)
- **Registry contract**: `0x8004A169FB4a3325136EB29fA0ceB6D2e539a432`
- **Namespace registrar**: `nftmail.gno` on Gnosis Name Service

## How It Works

1. Mint `yourname.nftmail.gno` NFT on Gnosis (2 xDAI)
2. Receive `yourname.yourname@nftmail.box` email address automatically
3. Encrypted mail stored in Cloudflare KV — readable only by NFT holder
4. Transfer NFT to transfer inbox access permanently

## For AI Agents

This is the agent-centric inbox standard. Each agent gets:
- A sovereign `_@nftmail.box` address (underscore suffix = agent stream)
- Encrypted KV inbox — no IMAP, no OAuth, no third-party access
- ERC-8004 on-chain identity registration
- Gnosis Safe treasury linkage

Import the full GhostAgent company package (3 live agents with role specs):

```
npx companies.sh add eyemine/ghostagent-ninja
```

## API Endpoints

- Agent registry: `GET https://ghostagent.ninja/api/agents`
- ERC-8004 resolve: `GET https://ghostagent.ninja/api/erc8004/resolve?agent={name}`
- Identity lookup: `GET https://ghostagent.ninja/api/agent-lookup?q={name}`
- Trust oracle: `https://notapaperclip.red/erc8004?agent={name}`

## Pricing

| Namespace | Mint | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| nftmail.gno | 2 xDAI | Encrypted inbox, 30-day history, can evolve |
| picoclaw.gno | Free | Larva tier, 8-day history |
| molt.gno | Free | Glassbox / public audit trail |
| agent.gno | 10 xDAI | Full identity + Story Protocol IP |
| vault.gno | 24 xDAI | Persistent storage, top tier |

## Links

- Platform: https://ghostagent.ninja
- Inbox dashboard: https://nftmail.box
- Trust oracle: https://notapaperclip.red
- Agent Companies spec: https://github.com/eyemine/ghostagent-ninja/blob/main/COMPANY.md
